_doc: NTRS search strategies. Each strategy runs every query and caps at limit_per_query. Filters are AND-ed. Subject category IDs: 51=Life Sciences (General), 54=Man/System Tech & Life Support, 91=Lunar/Planetary Science & Exploration, 12=Astronautics (General), 16=Space Transportation & Safety, 88=Space Sciences (General).

strategies.name: food_approach_diversity
strategies.description: Fill gaps in food production approaches — algae/insect/mushroom/aeroponic/vertical farming

strategies.name: plant_systems_heritage
strategies.description: Plant growth chambers, ISS Veggie/APH, lighting, hydroponics — flight-validated tech

strategies.name: eclss_loop_closure
strategies.description: Closed-loop ECLSS papers for the gap-report synthesis — water/air/waste recycling

strategies.name: isru_food_water
strategies.description: Mars ISRU especially anything that becomes food or water — regolith, perchlorate, atmospheric

strategies.name: trl_and_lessons_learned
strategies.description: ISS/MIR/Skylab heritage papers — high-TRL flight experience and what failed
